output:
401	        interrupt_on=gated,
   402	    )
   403	
   404	
   405	def _make_general_purpose_runner(
   406	    *,
   407	    model: str,
   408	    user_tools: list,
   409	    skills: list[str] | None,
   410	    memory: list[str] | None,
   411	    resolved_backend: BackendProtocol,
   412	    checkpointer: str,
   413	    debug: bool,
   414	    max_turns: int,
   415	    extra_run_hooks: tuple[RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]], ...],
   416	    response_format: type | None,
   417	) -> "DeepAgentRunner":
   418	    """Same tools/skills/memory file paths as parent; does not add extra handoffs."""
   419	    return create_deep_agent(
   420	        model=model,
   421	        tools=user_tools,
   422	        name="general_purpose",
   423	        description=(
   424	            "General-purpose agent for tasks like, searching for files and content, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. This agent has access to all tools as the main agent."
   425	        ),
   426	        system_prompt="",
   427	        subagents=None,
   428	        skills=list(skills or []),
   429	        memory=memory,
   430	        response_format=response_format,
   431	        backend=resolved_backend,
   432	        checkpointer=checkpointer,
   433	        debug=debug,
   434	        max_turns=max_turns,
   435	        run_hooks=extra_run_hooks,
   436	        include_general_purpose=False,
   437	    )

   440	class DeepRunBinding:
   441	    """Bound agent + SQLite session + hooks for one conversation thread."""
   442	
   443	    def __init__(
   444	        self,
   445	        runner: DeepAgentRunner,
   446	        session_id: str,
   447	        *,
   448	        resume: bool,
   449	        hooks: RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]] | None = None,
   450	        hitl: Hitl | None = None,
   451	    ) -> None:
   452	        self._runner = runner
   453	        self.session_id = session_id
   454	        self.ctx = runner._make_ctx(session_id, resume)
   455	        self.ctx.hitl = hitl
   456	        if hitl is not None:
   457	            hitl.attach_session(runner._backend, session_id)
   458	        self.session = create_session(session_id, runner._checkpointer)
   459	        self.agent = runner._prepare_agent()
   460	        self.hooks = hooks if hooks is not None else runner._make_hooks()
   461	
   462	    async def run(self, inp: str | RunState) -> RunResult:
   463	        # Fresh runs wrap ``AgentContext`` in a new :class:`RunContextWrapper` inside the SDK.
   464	        # Resuming from :class:`RunState` must keep ``run_state._context`` (same wrapper as
   465	        # ``result.to_state()``).
   466	        resume_ctx: RunContextWrapper[AgentContext] | AgentContext | None = (
   467	            None if isinstance(inp, RunState) else self.ctx
   468	        )
   469	        return await Runner.run(
   470	            self.agent,
   471	            inp,
   472	            context=resume_ctx,
   473	            session=self.session,
   474	            hooks=self.hooks,
   475	            max_turns=self._runner._max_turns,
   476	        )
   477	
   478	    def run_streamed(self, inp: str | RunState) -> RunResultStreaming:
   479	        """Stream one turn using the bound prepared agent (same tool list as :meth:`run`)."""
   480	        resume_ctx: RunContextWrapper[AgentContext] | AgentContext | None = (
   481	            None if isinstance(inp, RunState) else self.ctx
   482	        )
   483	        return Runner.run_streamed(
   484	            self.agent,
   485	            inp,
   486	            context=resume_ctx,
   487	            session=self.session,
   488	            hooks=self.hooks,
   489	            max_turns=self._runner._max_turns,
   490	        )
   491	
   492	
   493	class DeepAgentRunner:
   494	    """High-level wrapper around an ``Agent`` plus Deepx context and session."""
   495	
   496	    def __init__(
   497	        self,
   498	        agent: Agent,
   499	        backend: BackendProtocol,
   500	        checkpointer: str,
   501	        max_turns: int,
   502	        skill_roots: list[str],
   503	        memory: str,
   504	        debug: bool,
   505	        agent_name: str,
   506	        description: str,
   507	        middleware_hooks: tuple[
   508	            RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]], ...
   509	        ] = (),
   510	        interrupt_on: frozenset[str] | None = None,
   511	    ) -> None:
   512	        self._agent = agent
   513	        self._backend = backend
   514	        self._checkpointer = checkpointer
   515	        self._max_turns = max_turns
   516	        self._skill_roots = list(skill_roots)
   517	        self._memory = memory
   518	        self._debug = debug
   519	        self._agent_name = agent_name
   520	        self.description = description
   521	        self._middleware_hooks = middleware_hooks
   522	        self._interrupt_on = interrupt_on or frozenset()
   523	
   524	    @property
   525	    def backend(self) -> BackendProtocol:
   526	        return self._backend
   527	
   528	    def bind(
   529	        self,
   530	        session_id: str,
   531	        *,
   532	        resume: bool = False,
   533	        hooks: RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]] | None = None,
   534	        hitl: Hitl | None = None,
   535	    ) -> DeepRunBinding:
   536	        return DeepRunBinding(
   537	            self,
   538	            session_id,
   539	            resume=resume,
   540	            hooks=hooks,
   541	            hitl=hitl,
   542	        )
   543	
   544	    def _make_ctx(self, session_id: str, resume: bool) -> AgentContext:
   545	        si = _skills_prompt_for_backend(self._backend, self._skill_roots)
   546	        return AgentContext(
   547	            session_id=session_id,
   548	            backend=self._backend,
   549	            agent_name=self._agent_name,
   550	            memory=self._memory,
   551	            skills=si,
   552	            debug=self._debug,
   553	            resume=resume,
   554	            interrupt_on=self._interrupt_on,
   555	        )
   556	
   557	    def _make_hooks(self) -> RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]]:
   558	        fs = FilesystemHooks(self._backend)
   559	        parts: list[RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]]] = [fs]
   560	        if self._debug:
   561	            parts.append(SessionToolLogHooks(self._backend))
   562	        parts.extend(self._middleware_hooks)
   563	        return compose_run_hooks(*parts)
   564	
   565	    def _prepare_agent(self) -> Agent:
   566	        wrapped = apply_tool_pipeline(
   567	            list(self._agent.tools),
   568	            self._backend,
   569	            interrupt_on=self._interrupt_on,
   570	        )
   571	        return dataclasses.replace(self._agent, tools=wrapped)
   572	
   573	    def prepared_agent(self) -> Agent:
   574	        """Agent with filesystem middleware applied (tool pipeline + HITL)."""
   575	        return self._prepare_agent()
   576	
   577	    async def run(
   578	        self,
   579	        task: str,
   580	        *,
   581	        session_id: str | None = None,
   582	        resume: bool = False,
   583	        hooks: RunHooksBase[AgentContext, AgentType[AgentContext]] | None = None,
   584	    ) -> "DeepRunResult":
   585	        sid = session_id or uuid.uuid4().hex
   586	        b = self.bind(sid, resume=resume, hooks=hooks)
   587	        result = await b.run(task)
   588	        return DeepRunResult(
   589	            output=result.final_output,
   590	            session_id=sid,
   591	            plan=b.ctx.plan,
   592	            run_result=result,
   593	        )
   594	
   595	    def run_sync(
   596	        self,
   597	        task: str,
   598	        *,
   599	        session_id: str | None = None,
   600	        resume: bool = False,
   601	    ) -> "DeepRunResult":
   602	        coro = self.run(task, session_id=session_id, resume=resume)
   603	        try:
   604	            asyncio.get_running_loop()
   605	        except RuntimeError:
   606	            return asyncio.run(coro)
   607	        import concurrent.futures
   608	
   609	        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor() as pool:
   610	            return cast("DeepRunResult", pool.submit(asyncio.run, coro).result())
   611	
   612	    async def run_stream(
   613	        self,
   614	        task: str,
   615	        *,
   616	        session_id: str | None = None,
   617	        resume: bool = False,
   618	    ):
   619	        sid = session_id or uuid.uuid4().hex
   620	        b = self.bind(sid, resume=resume)
   621	        resume_ctx: RunContextWrapper[AgentContext] | AgentContext | None = b.ctx
   622	        stream = Runner.run_streamed(
   623	            b.agent,
   624	            task,
   625	            context=resume_ctx,
   626	            session=b.session,
   627	            hooks=b.hooks,
   628	            max_turns=self._max_turns,
   629	        )
   630	        async for event in stream.stream_events():
   631	            yield event
   632	        yield {"kind": "done", "output_preview": str(stream.final_output)}
   633	
   634	
   635	class DeepRunResult:
   636	    def __init__(
   637	        self,
   638	        output: Any,
   639	        session_id: str,
   640	        plan: "Plan",
   641	        *,
   642	        run_result: RunResult | None = None,
   643	    ) -> None:
   644	        self.output = output
   645	        self.session_id = session_id
   646	        self.plan = plan
   647	        self.run_result = run_result
   648	
   649	    def __repr__(self) -> str:
   650	        return (
   651	            f"DeepRunResult(session_id={self.session_id!r}, "
   652	            f"output={str(self.output)[:80]!r})"
   653	        )
   654	
   655	
   656	def _load_memory(memory: list[str] | None, backend: BackendProtocol) -> str:
   657	    """Load memory files in list order; concatenate with ``\\n\\n`` between files.
   658	
   659	    Relative paths try **host_root** first (when the backend has one), then **cwd**.
   660	    ``memory=`` is a ``list[str]`` of file paths only (not inline prose).
   661	    """
   662	    if not memory:
   663	        return ""
   664	    host = resolve_root_dir(backend)
   665	    parts: list[str] = []
   666	    for raw in memory:
   667	        s = (raw or "").strip()
   668	        if not s:
   669	            continue
   670	        p = Path(s).expanduser()
   671	        found: Path | None = None
   672	        if p.is_absolute():
   673	            try:
   674	                rp = p.resolve()
   675	                if rp.is_file():
   676	                    found = rp
   677	            except OSError:
   678	                pass
   679	        else:
   680	            rel = s.lstrip("./")
   681	            candidates: list[Path] = []
   682	            if host is not None:
   683	                candidates.append(host / rel)
   684	            candidates.append(Path.cwd() / s)
   685	            for cand in candidates:
   686	                try:
   687	                    rc = cand.resolve()
   688	                    if rc.is_file():
   689	                        found = rc
   690	                        break
   691	                except OSError:
   692	                    continue
   693	        if found is not None:
   694	            parts.append(found.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"))
   695	    return "\n\n".join(parts)
   696	
   697	
   698	DeepAgent = create_deep_agent
   699	
   700	__all__ = [
   701	    "DeepAgent",
   702	    "DeepAgentRunner",
   703	    "DeepRunBinding",
   704	    "DeepRunResult",
   705	    "Hitl",
   706	    "create_deep_agent",
   707	]
